heading: Implement a Long-Term Solution
body:
To prevent MongoDB Search alerts in the future, carefully review the
[Performance Considerations](perf-ref) for MongoDB Search.

To optimize your indexes, we recommend deploying [Search Nodes](configure-search-nodes), which allows you to scale your
Atlas cluster and [$search](pipe.$search) workloads independently.
Dedicated Search Nodes only run the `mongot` process and therefore
improve the availability, performance, and workload balancing of the
`mongot` process.
